title: Hiking in Valley of Fire
summary:
We wanted to check out the Valley of Fire before leaving the Vegas area so we slowly made our way to a dispersed site right outside of the park. We spent the next day hiking in the park, doing a couple of loops through featured slick rock canyons. One of the perks of the van is that when you're done hiking, all your food is with you so you can make delicious toasted sandwiches in the parking lot!

-Helen
campsites: Valley of Fire West Dispersed Camping
